title: Run simplify on recent code changes

log.context: Run simplify on recent code changes

All clean. Here's a summary of what was fixed:

**Issues found and fixed:**

1. **Direct workflow call to `_is_congress_model`** — the workflow was calling an activity module's private function directly at workflow execution time, bypassing Temporal's activity dispatch. Added `filter_non_text` as a proper `@activity.defn` wrapper and updated the workflow to call it via `workflow.execute_activity`. Registered it in `scout_worker.py`.
